dashboard.title: Hiring overview
dashboard.missingProfileTitle: Complete your company profile to get started
dashboard.description: View your company profile, job posting performance and application metrics to adjust your hiring strategy.
dashboard.emptyJobsDesc: You don't have any job postings yet. Create your first job to start hiring.
dashboard.applicationRateHint: Keep your company profile complete and job postings up to date to increase the qualified application rate.
dashboard.errorDesc: An error occurred while loading data. Please try reloading the page or contact the admin if the issue persists.

profile.title: Company profile
profile.description: Manage your company information (logo, website, address, description) so candidates can learn more about your brand and work environment.
profile.formSubtitle: Accurate and complete information makes your job postings more professional and builds trust with candidates.
profile.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief introduction about your company, industry, size, work culture...
profile.previewHint: A complete company profile is a prerequisite before submitting a verification request and posting jobs.
profile.statusNotCreated: You haven't created a company profile yet.
profile.errorDesc: An error occurred while loading data. Please try again later or contact the admin if the issue recurs.
profile.validNameMin: Company name must be at least 2 characters
profile.validLogoUrl: Logo URL must be a valid URL
profile.validWebsiteUrl: Website must be a valid URL
profile.validDescMax: Description must be at most 2000 characters
profile.profileRequiredDesc: Please complete your company profile before managing job postings.
profile.previewDescriptionFallback: Company description will be shown here

verification.title: Business verification
verification.description: Submit legal documents (business license, tax ID, etc.) for the CanPany team to verify and add a trusted badge to your company.
verification.alreadyVerifiedHint: Your company is already verified. You can still resubmit documents if you want to update them.
verification.reviewHint: If the request is pending or rejected, review document URLs to avoid the admin requesting additional information.
verification.formHint: Each line is a link to a document (PDF, image...) stored on your system.
verification.profileRequiredDesc: Please complete your company profile before submitting a verification request.
verification.errorDesc: An error occurred while loading verification information. Please try again later or contact the admin.
verification.validDocRequired: Please enter at least one document URL

jobs.title: Manage job postings
jobs.description: Create, edit and open/close job postings directly here.
jobs.emptyDesc: Try creating a new job posting or changing the filter.
jobs.profileRequiredDesc: Please complete your company profile before managing job postings.
jobs.errorDesc: An error occurred while loading job postings. Please try again later or contact the admin.
jobs.actionHint: You can create, edit, and close/reopen job postings directly here.

jobForm.categoryPlaceholder: Enter category ID from system / ops team
jobForm.categoryHint: Category ID is an internal category code for classifying jobs (e.g. DEV_FRONTEND, BA_MID). It does not have to match the job title shown to candidates.
jobForm.categoryHintLooksLikeTitle: The value looks more like a position name (with spaces) than an internal category code. Check the category docs or contact ops for the correct code if you need reporting by category.
jobForm.categoryHintEmpty: If you don't have a suitable category code yet, you can leave it blank. The system will still create the job, but category-based reporting may be less accurate.
jobForm.editModeNote: Some basic fields like categoryId, budgetType and isRemote cannot be changed after the job is created. If you need to change them, create a new job posting with the correct information.
jobForm.validTitleMin: Job title must be at least 5 characters
jobForm.validDescriptionMin: Job description must be at least 20 characters
jobForm.validBudgetNumber: Budget must be a valid number
jobForm.profileRequiredDesc: Complete your company profile before creating or editing job postings.
jobForm.errorLoadDesc: An error occurred while loading the job. Please try again later or contact the admin for support.
jobForm.pageDescription: Create or edit the job posting: title, description, skills, salary, location and deadline.
jobForm.tipsTitle: Tips for writing effective job posts
jobForm.tip1: Use a clear title that states the role and level.
jobForm.tip2: Focus the description on main responsibilities, required skills and benefits.
jobForm.tip3: Be transparent about location, work type and salary to attract the right candidates.

candidateSearch.title: Candidate search
candidateSearch.description: Find candidates by job matching, filters, or semantic search based on job description.
candidateSearch.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the ideal candidate: key skills, level, domain...
candidateSearch.emptyDesc: Run a search query to see matching candidates.
candidateSearch.emptyNoMatchDesc: Try relaxing your filters or changing the search description.
candidateSearch.profileRequiredDesc: Please complete your company profile before searching for candidates.
candidateSearch.errorDesc: An error occurred while loading search data. Please try again later or contact the admin.
candidateSearch.toastSelectJob: Please select a job to search for candidates
candidateSearch.toastEnterDesc: Please enter a job description for semantic search

applications.title: Review applications
applications.description: View and process job applications from your job postings.
applications.selectJobFirst: Select a job to load applications.
applications.emptyNoJobDesc: Select a job posting in the left panel to view applications.
applications.emptyNoMatchDesc: No candidates have applied or the current filter doesn't match.
applications.profileRequiredDesc: Please complete your company profile before reviewing applications.
applications.errorDesc: An error occurred while loading applications. Please try again later.

applicationDetail.title: Application detail
applicationDetail.description: View detailed information, update status and add internal notes for the application.
applicationDetail.noCV: Candidate did not attach a CV
applicationDetail.noCoverLetter: Candidate did not include a cover letter.
applicationDetail.noProfileSummary: Candidate has not updated their bio.
applicationDetail.missingIdDesc: The current URL does not have a valid application ID.
applicationDetail.errorDesc: Please check the route or try reloading the page.
applicationDetail.toastUnlockCVFirst: Please unlock candidate contact before viewing CVs.
applicationDetail.toastLoadCVFailed: Unable to load candidate CVs. Please try again.
applicationDetail.toastEnterRejectReason: Please enter a reason before rejecting.
applicationDetail.toastEnterNote: Please enter a note before saving.
applicationDetail.noCVAvailable: The candidate has no available CVs.
applicationDetail.cvAccessNotReady: Candidate CV access is not ready yet. Please try again later or check your access/unlock level.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: Communicate directly with candidates during the hiring process.
messages.descriptionActive: Messages are automatically refreshed. All communications are encrypted.
messages.loadFailed: Unable to load messages. Please check your connection and try again.
messages.noMessages: No messages yet. Start the conversation.
messages.sendHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
messages.noConversationDesc: Open an application detail page and click 'Message candidate' to start a conversation.
messages.errorDesc: A connection error occurred. Please try again later or contact the admin.

applicationNotes.title: Internal notes
applicationNotes.hint: Internal notes are saved to the application record for review. For long-term tracking under your internal process, add notes in your company management system.
applicationNotes.placeholder: Enter an internal note for this application

applicationReview.noCoverLetter: Candidate did not include a cover letter.

applicationStatus.title: Review actions
applicationStatus.rejectPlaceholder: Enter a reason to notify the candidate
applicationStatus.alreadyProcessed: This application has already been processed and cannot be changed.
